_doc: Ravnica: Clue Edition (CLU) — standalone murder-mystery board-game product (released 2024-02-23). Source: https://magic.wizards.com/en/news/announcements/ravnica-clue-edition-ravnica-cluedo-edition-booster-contents . The box ships eight 20-card 'Ravnica: Clue Edition Boosters' (ten guild themes × two variations = 20 distinct lists) plus a separate Clue Booster of 21 Evidence cards and a foil borderless shock-land box topper. There is only ONE consumer booster product and it is a single draftable 20-card pack, so we map it onto our 'draft' type and set authoritative:true so no other pack types are offered. No Set, Play, or Collector Booster exists for this product. The guild boosters are fixed Jumpstart-style half-decks (each ready-to-play with all needed lands), so per-slot rarity is not truly randomized; we approximate a representative 20-card composition consistent with Wizards' spec: '20 non-foil cards including all the lands you need to play; 1 new Rare card and 1 reprint card of rarity Rare or higher per booster.' Set composition: 252 regular cards (129C / 68U / 29R / 11M / 20 basic lands); the 21 Evidence cards (CLU #1–21: 6 borderless legendary suspects, 5 artifact weapons, 10 location lands) are game pieces, not part of the random booster pool, and are excluded here. All cards are non-foil; the only foil in the box is the box-topper shock land, which is not opened from a booster.

draft.tagline: 20 cards · ready to play · 1 new rare + 1 reprint rare/mythic · all lands included · non-foil
